title:
Doctors for Aged Care (On-Road / Face-to-Face) After Hours
Doctors for Aged Care (On-Road / Face-to-Face) After Hours with verification
description:
About the job
On-Road Aged Care Doctors – Northern Beaches, Sydney
At 13SICK, our Doctors care for some of the most vulnerable members of our community — showing up in person, after hours, when reassurance, dignity and clinical judgement matter most.

We’re growing our Aged Care On-Road Doctor team, delivering compassionate, bulk-billed, face-to-face care in aged care facilities when residents need it — and when their regular GP isn’t available.
Flexible weeknight, weekend & public holiday shifts
Strong clinical, operational and coordination support
AHPRA-registered GP (FRACGP preferred)
Experience in aged care or general practice is highly regarded
Driver’s license and access to a reliable and insured vehicle

Apply via LinkedIn or message us for a confidential conversation.
Come and do work that truly matters. Join our team today.
